name: Techcential International Ltd
summary: Techcential International Ltd, an investment holding company, designs, manufactures, and sells American wooden bedroom furniture products. It offers 5-piece bedroom furniture, including bed frames, night stand, dresser, chest, and mirror. The company also engages in the production and manufacturing of wood pellets; processing and manufacturing of rubber wood raw materials; and wholesale of wooden restaurant furniture and children's bed furniture. It has operations in the United States, Malaysia, Canada, and internationally. Techcential International Ltd was founded in 2001 and is based in Grand Cayman, Cayman Islands.
